sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 8.56 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.8)

statement.latex: Let$X$be a finite set and$f$a mapping from the set of subsets of$X$to the positive integers. Under the requirement that in a group generated by$X$, every subgroup$< Y >$, \$Y X$, be nilpotent of class$f(Y)$, is it true that the free group$G_f$relative to this condition is torsion-free? { A.\,Yu.\,Olshanskii} Not always (V.\,V.\,Bludov, V.\,F.\,Kleimenov, E.\,V.\,Khlamov, Algebra and Logic, { 29} (...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
